intended_use: TruSPECT is intended for acceptance, transfer, display, storage, and processing of images for detection of radioisotope tracer uptakes in the patient's body. The device using various processing modes
intended_use_full: TruSPECT is intended for acceptance, transfer, display, storage, and processing of images for detection of radioisotope tracer uptakes in the patient's body. The device using various processing modes supported by the various clinical applications and various features designed to enhance image quality. The emission computerized tomography data can be coupled with registered and/or fused CT/MR scans and with physiological signals in order to depict, localize, and/or quantify the distribution of radionuclide tracers and anatomical structures in scanned body tissue for clinical diagnostic purposes. The acquired tomographic image may undergo emission-based attenuation correction.
target_condition: Detection of radioisotope tracer uptake in the patient's body; cardiac imaging applications including sympathetic innervation assessment and myocardial blood flow measurement
ground_truth: Manual assessment by experienced NM Physicists and Physicians using visual evaluation and 5-point Likert scale scoring
other_metrics: 5-point Likert scale scoring by NM Physicists and Physicians; algorithm performance evaluated on test datasets of representative clinical exams
